name: mary-workflow
description: Cycle-aware workflows with validated paper reading, grounded summaries, ShanghaiTech Marp slides, and append-only expert Q&A for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Mary Workflow packages a stable v2.1 milestone engine plus v2.2 research skills for independent paper states, arXiv HTML/PDF acquisition, parse-quality gating, contract-validated close reading, grounded article summaries, ShanghaiTech red Marp slides, and append-only expert Q&A with four-value judgments and exact source citations.
